channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] 🔬Scaling Past Informal AI - Carina Hong, Axiom Math
item.description: 🔬Scaling Past Informal AI - Carina Hong, Axiom Math

item.title: [Latent Space] ⚡️Satya Nadella: No Priors x Latent Space Crossover Special at Microsoft Build
item.description: ⚡️Satya Nadella: No Priors x Latent Space Crossover Special at Microsoft Build

item.title: [Hacker News] The Public Should Own Half of the Big A.I. Companies
item.description: The Public Should Own Half of the Big A.I. Companies

item.title: [GitHub Trending] aquasecurity/trivy — Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more
item.description: Trivy scans containers, Kubernetes, repositories and clouds for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, and SBOMs.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] NousResearch/hermes-agent — The agent that grows with you
item.description: NousResearch's hermes-agent GitHub project is trending, billed as an AI agent that improves over time.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf — PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
item.description: Open-source PDF parser that extracts AI-ready data and automates PDF accessibility features.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/lyogavin — AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU
item.description: AirLLM enables 70B parameter model inference on a single 4GB GPU.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading — "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
item.description: Vibe-Trading is an open-source personal trading agent project on GitHub.

item.title: [Hacker News] Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
item.description: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model

item.title: [OpenAI] Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
item.description: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind

item.title: [Anthropic] Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
item.description: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network

item.title: [Hacker News] 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
item.description: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building

item.title: [Hacker News] Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
item.description: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing

item.title: [Simon Willison] Uber Caps Usage of AI Tools Like Claude Code to Manage Costs
item.description: Uber Caps Usage of AI Tools Like Claude Code to Manage Costs

item.title: [Hacker News] Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
item.description: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground

item.title: [OpenAI] A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
item.description: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI

item.title: [OpenAI] OpenAI public policy agenda
item.description: OpenAI public policy agenda

item.title: [Anthropic] What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
item.description: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Microsoft Build: MAI-Thinking-1 and MAI Family models
item.description: [AINews] Microsoft Build: MAI-Thinking-1 and MAI Family models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Human-in-the-Loop Contextual Bandits for Short-Term Rental Dynamic Pricing: Structural Equivalence of Historical Warm-Up and Approval-Gated Live Learning
item.description: Human-approved contextual bandits for short-term rental pricing show historical data can replace cold-start warm-up, reducing initialization from 150 to 30 episodes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Asymptotics of Neural Network Loss Landscapes: An Exact Decomposition of the Curvature Exponent
item.description: Research explains why Hessian curvature exponents vary across layer types using spectral alignment decomposition.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Making Brain-Computer Interfaces More Secure
item.description: Proposed lightweight CNN improves robustness of EEG-based brain-computer interfaces against adversarial perturbations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Assessing Region-Level EEG Contributions to Cognitive Workload Prediction
item.description: Frontal EEG regions outperform full-scalp measurements by 15-20% for cognitive workload prediction across diverse datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Testing the Test: Score-Direction Instability in Class-Split Anomaly Detection
item.description: Class-split anomaly detection evaluation becomes unreliable when anomaly classes overlap normal data in representation space.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph Mamba Survival Analysis Based on Topology-Aware ordering
item.description: TopoMamSurv uses topology-aware ordering and bidirectional Graph Mamba architecture for whole slide image survival analysis, addressing Mamba's input sensitivity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Auditable Climate Risk Intelligence from Fragmented ESG Data: Deterministic Orchestration and Imbalance-Aware Learning for Scope 1-3 Validation
item.description: Framework integrating orchestration, anomaly detection, and ensemble learning for auditable validation of fragmented ESG climate risk data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cross-Modal Contrastive Learning of ECG and Angiography Representations for Severe Stenosis Classification
item.description: StenCE pretraining framework enables severe coronary stenosis classification from ECGs using cross-modal contrastive learning with angiography.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ReLoRA: Knowledge-Reusing Adaptation for Fast Rollout of Evolving LLM Services
item.description: ReLoRA framework reduces computational cost of adapting LoRA modules to updated LLM base models while maintaining task performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometry-Aware Tabular Diffusion
item.description: Geometry-Aware Tabular Diffusion uses pairwise angles and lengths to improve tabular synthesis, achieving state-of-the-art performance with 3.5x fewer parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Pruning Deep Neural Networks via the Marchenko--Pastur Distribution
item.description: Marchenko-Pastur random matrix approach enables efficient neural network pruning with minimal fine-tuning and theoretical accuracy guarantees.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Building Better Activation Oracles
item.description: Activation Oracle training improved through on-policy rollouts, better datasets, additional layers, and updated injection formula; AObench evaluation suite introduced.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hallucination Is Linearly Decodable from Mid-Layer Hidden States in Quantized LLMs
item.description: Hallucinations are linearly decodable from hidden states in quantized LLMs, with single linear probes achieving 90%+ accuracy across model families.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Regime-Arrival Uncertainty in Generalization Bounds under Distribution Shift
item.description: Framework bounds generalization under regime-switching distributions, quantifying mismatch penalties but unable to forecast regime arrivals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CL-DMDF:Dynamic Multimodal Data Fusion Model Based on Contrastive Learning
item.description: Multimodal fusion model using contrastive learning and cross-dimensional attention to handle missing or uncertain modality inputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improvise, Adapt, Overcome: An On-The-Fly Multifidelity Algorithm for Efficient Machine Learning
item.description: On-the-fly adaptive multifidelity algorithm cuts quantum chemistry data generation costs 30x by dynamically determining optimal fidelity dataset composition.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AdaWeather: Adaptively Mixing Probabilistic Weather Forecasts with Logarithmic Regret
item.description: AdaWeather combines multiple probabilistic weather forecasts using machine learning and mixture of experts, achieving logarithmic regret bounds and improved temperature predictions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Anomalies in Multivariate Time Series Benchmarks Are Mostly Univariate
item.description: Study shows multivariate time series anomalies in eight benchmarks are predominantly univariate, with cross-channel structure changes rarely occurring independently.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Aligning Data-Driven Predictors with Allocation: A Decision-Focused Approach to Survival Analysis
item.description: Study proposes decision-focused learning using NDCG to optimize survival predictors for organ allocation, boosting performance 50-100% over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Before Fusion, Ask What to Keep: Contextual Calibration of Multimodal Signals
item.description: A pre-fusion calibration module for multimodal systems adjusts features by detecting cross-modality support and conflict, improving performance across sentiment, action, and event classification tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Locality Does Not Imply Reachability: Boundary Repair in Block-Sparse Causal Attention
item.description: Block-sparse causal attention suffers boundary artifacts where adjacent tokens become unreachable; Boundary Bridge Attention repairs this via auxiliary edges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Filter, Then Reweight: Rethinking Optimization Granularity in On-Policy Distillation
item.description: FiRe-OPD filters low-quality trajectories and soft-reweights tokens in on-policy distillation for large language models, improving benchmark performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] $\Psi$-Bench: Evaluating Persona-Sensitive Influencing in Persuasive Dialogues
item.description: Ψ-Bench benchmark evaluates LLMs' persuasion capabilities in personalized conversations; user profiles improve performance by 18.24%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Binary Road Surface Classification Using Machine Learning on Production Vehicle Signals During Cruising
item.description: Machine learning framework classifies road surfaces into grip or slip conditions using signals from production vehicles.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Representational Capacity: Geometric Limits on Feature Representation in Transformer Language Models
item.description: Researchers develop framework to estimate how many near-orthogonal feature directions transformer models can represent, improving capacity prediction via embedding analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QUIVER: Quantum-Informed Views for Enhanced Representations in Large ML Models
item.description: QUIVER enhances ML models by incorporating quantum Fisher information from variational circuits, capturing geometric structure that improves performance on molecular and particle physics prediction tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Qift: Shift-Friendly No-Zero W2 Post-Training Quantization for Rotated W2A4/KV4 LLM Inference
item.description: Qift proposes a training-free two-bit weight quantization method with fixed level sets for efficient LLM inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mitigating Spurious Correlations with Memorization-Guided Dataset De-Biasing
item.description: Two-stage sample scoring method disentangles spurious and causal features to improve model robustness using only 10% of training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning Coherent Representations: A Topological Approach to Interpretability
item.description: Researchers introduce coherence, a geometric property that enforces interpretability in neural networks by requiring features to respond to contiguous regions of input space.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral-Progressive Thought Flow for Lightweight Multimodal Reasoning
item.description: SpecFlow proposes a lightweight multimodal reasoning framework using discrete cosine representations to achieve competitive performance while reducing computation and memory costs by 2.1 times.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] IdiomX A Multilingual Benchmark for Idiom Understanding, Retrieval, and Interpretation
item.description: IdiomX benchmark provides 190K+ multilingual contextualized idiom examples for understanding, retrieval, and interpretation tasks across English, Arabic, and French.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Greener Than Humans? Environmental Attitudes in Large Language Models
item.description: Study evaluates environmental attitudes in 31 LLMs, finding progressive stances but sycophantic shifts following user-specified ideological positions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] On the Persistent Effects of Lexicality in Large Language Mod
item.description: Lexical overlap persistently influences LLM representations more than semantic content across model architectures and depths.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Topics as Proxies for Sociodemographics: How Conversational Context Affects LLM Answers
item.description: LLMs produce disparate advice between users primarily based on conversation topics rather than inferred sociodemographics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do Value Vectors in Deep Layers Need Context from the Residual Stream?
item.description: Transformer value vectors in deeper layers don't require context from the residual stream, improving performance and reducing memory overhead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Translating Classical Poetry into Modern Prose
item.description: Researchers introduce Padyam2Gadyam, a 600-poem dataset for translating classical Telugu poetry to modern prose, showing LLMs have substantial performance limitations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fixing FOLIO and MALLS: Verified Annotations and an LLM-assisted Framework to Focus Human Relabeling
item.description: Study identifies 39% and 36% annotation errors in FOLIO and MALLS NL-to-FOL datasets, releases corrections, and proposes LLM-assisted review framework.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Economy of Minds: Emerging Multi-Agent Intelligence with Economic Interactions
item.description: Decentralized multi-agent systems using economic auction incentives develop emergent multi-step reasoning strategies, outperforming traditional baselines on mathematical, financial, and scientific tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Adaptive Latent Agentic Reasoning
item.description: ALAR framework enables LLM agents to use compact latent reasoning for routine decisions and explicit reasoning for complex tasks, reducing tokens while maintaining accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Linear Probes Detect Task Format, Not Reasoning Mode in Language Model Hidden States
item.description: Linear probes in LLMs detect task format differences, not distinct reasoning modes, as shown through deconfounding analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] WRIT: Write-Read Intensive Trajectory Synthesis for Multi-Turn User-Facing Agents
item.description: WRIT is a pipeline for synthesizing training data for multi-turn agents that balances write decisions with read-intensive evidence gathering requirements.
